summary: Intel Q1 2026 blowout: +24.89% gap up, revenue $13.58B (+7.2% YoY), Data Center +22% YoY. Intel result positive read-through for AMD. Nvidia still dominant in AI GPUs but AMD secured major wins: 6GW OpenAI GPU commitment, 50,000 MI450 GPUs for Oracle, 1GW Cisco/HUMAIN deal. Custom ASICs (not AMD/Nvidia/Intel) cited as biggest Nvidia threat long-term. Europe targeting Chinese-made mature-node semiconductors — could benefit AMD foundry relationships.
